long_description:
[RNOS]-RNOS ServiceDnlbIPUsedPercent is at or above 60% [WDC] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/serviceDNLB_virtual_IP_capacity.html
TIP Situation:                      Observed Low ServiceDnlb IP available issue in is-rnos-service-dnlb
TIP Short Description:              RNOS ServiceDnlbIPUsedPercent is at or above 60% rias-ng-us-east-wdc06-prod
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-network-ips:us-east::rias-ng-us-east-wdc06-prod:microservice:

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-2
Metric:
    sum by (kube_cluster_name, zone)((avg_over_time(rias_rnos_service_dnlb_used{}[10m])/(avg_over_time(rias_rnos_service_dnlb_available{}[10m]) + avg_over_time(rias_rnos_service_dnlb_used{}[10m]))*100) / 3) >= 60 = 61.83
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'rias-ng-us-east-wdc06-prod' and zone = 'us-east-3'

Time:                12/08/2025 12:06 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:
